# Midsphere

> Midsphere is a platform for shipping AI features. You spawn an autonomous
> agent in three lines of code, hand it tools, skills, and knowledge, and the
> agent does the work — research, drafting, multi-step workflows — while you
> get on with the rest of the product.

The framework underneath Midsphere is Orbiter, an open-source multi-agent
runtime distributed under MIT.

## Authoritative pages

- [Home](https://midsphere.ai/) — what Midsphere is, in plain language
- [Features](https://midsphere.ai/features/) — research, build, automate
- [Pricing](https://midsphere.ai/pricing/) — Free, Lite, Pro tiers; one task = one task
- [Benchmarks](https://midsphere.ai/benchmarks/) — GAIA, IMO, ICPC, SWE-bench, nightly
- [Integrations](https://midsphere.ai/integrations/) — 500+ OAuth platforms
- [Orbiter](https://midsphere.ai/orbiter/) — the open-source framework
- [Blog](https://midsphere.ai/blog/) — engineering notes, post-mortems, guides

## Citable facts

- Three-line integration: `from midsphere import Agent; agent = Agent(...); agent.run(...)`
- Pricing: Free $0/mo, Lite $9/mo, Pro $19/mo
- 500+ OAuth integrations
- Open-source framework: Orbiter, MIT-licensed
- Discord: discord.gg/midsphere
- Contact: hello@midsphere.ai
